_description: Model derivations for Switzerland vs Algeria 2026-07-02/03 R32

rule_checks.RULE8: FIRES — Draw=30.07% ≥ 25%. Competitive match; shade model-derived estimates toward 0.50
rule_checks.RULE12: Q10 (SUI 5+ SOT): removing Canada game (4 SOT) shifts P up; removing either 7-SOT game shifts P to ~0.50. Sensitive. Capped at 0.600 (RULE8 pull).
rule_checks.RULE15: Not applicable — Algeria not blowout underdog (21.06% > 10%)

espn_insight.note_on_gouiri_mahrez: Neither Gouiri nor Mahrez was top shooter in any ALG group game. Maza and Chaïbi are primary shooting threats.
